requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Guinea Regulatory Context and IEC 62619 / IEC 62933-5-2 International Baseline
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——几内亚监管背景及IEC 62619 / IEC 62933-5-2国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——幾內亞監管背景及IEC 62619 / IEC 62933-5-2國際基準

summary.en: Guinea does not have a confirmed BESS-specific fire safety installation standard or mandatory conformity certification regime enforced at the national level as of the dataset date. The primary standards body is IGNM (Institut Guinéen de Normalisation et de Métrologie); IGNM's current mandatory scope for BESS fire safety has not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources. In practice, fire safety requirements for BESS installations in Guinea are driven by project-level specifications, donor agency standards (World Bank, AfDB, IFC Environmental and Social Standards), and contractual obligations with EDG or mining/industrial concession authorities. Donor-financed projects operating in Guinea's solar-hybrid and rural electrification sectors typically reference IEC 62619 (cell and module safety) and IEC 62933-5-2 (electrochemical BESS system-level safety) as the applicable international baseline. NFPA 855 may be referenced by some international EPC contractors. Guinea's tropical coastal climate — high humidity, elevated ambient temperature, bauxite dust in mining contexts — imposes additional thermal and environmental hazard considerations for BESS fire safety design beyond the conditions addressed in standard IEC test regimes.
summary.zh: 截至本数据集日期，几内亚在国家层面尚无经确认的BESS专项消防安全安装标准或强制合格认证制度。主要标准机构为IGNM（几内亚标准化与计量研究院）；IGNM对BESS消防安全的现行强制范围尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认。实践中，几内亚BESS装置的消防安全要求由项目级规格、捐助机构标准（世界银行、非开行、IFC环境与社会标准）以及与EDG或矿业/工业特许权机构的合同义务驱动。几内亚太阳能混合微电网和农村电气化领域的捐助方资助项目通常以IEC 62619（电芯和模组安全）和IEC 62933-5-2（电化学BESS系统级安全）作为适用国际基准。部分国际EPC承包商可能引用NFPA 855。几内亚热带沿海气候——高湿度、较高环境温度、矿山环境中的铝土矿粉尘——对BESS消防安全设计提出了超出标准IEC测试制度所涵盖条件的额外热应力和环境危害考量。
summary.zht: 截至本數據集日期，幾內亞在國家層面尚無經確認的BESS專項消防安全安裝標準或強制合格認證制度。主要標準機構為IGNM（幾內亞標準化與計量研究院）；IGNM對BESS消防安全的現行強制範圍尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認。實踐中，幾內亞BESS裝置的消防安全要求由項目級規格、捐助機構標準（世界銀行、非開行、IFC環境與社會標準）以及與EDG或礦業/工業特許權機構的合同義務驅動。幾內亞太陽能混合微電網和農村電氣化領域的捐助方資助項目通常以IEC 62619（電芯和模組安全）和IEC 62933-5-2（電化學BESS系統級安全）作為適用國際基準。部分國際EPC承包商可能引用NFPA 855。幾內亞熱帶沿海氣候——高濕度、較高環境溫度、礦山環境中的鋁土礦粉塵——對BESS消防安全設計提出了超出標準IEC測試制度所涵蓋條件的額外熱應力和環境危害考量。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Guinea donor-financed project specifications)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level safety standard referenced in donor-financed project specifications)
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation
IGNM (Institut Guinéen de Normalisation et de Métrologie) — primary Guinea standards body; mandatory BESS fire-safety scope unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with IGNM
World Bank / AfDB / IFC Environmental and Social Standards — drive fire-safety requirements for donor-financed BESS projects in Guinea

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules (mandatory, effective August 1, 2025). GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) covers system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised as equivalent to IEC 62619 or IEC 62933-5-2 in Guinea donor-financed project specifications. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with IEC-aligned documentation for Guinea project review. Additionally, Chinese domestic testing conditions do not address Guinea's tropical humidity, dust, and elevated temperature environment — thermal derating and IP-rated enclosure specifications must be separately validated.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定（强制，2025年8月1日起生效）。GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查由地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被几内亚捐助方资助项目规格认可为等同于IEC 62619或IEC 62933-5-2。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据须在几内亚项目审查中补充符合IEC要求的文件。此外，中国国内测试条件不涵盖几内亚的热带湿度、尘埃和高温环境——须另行验证热降额和IP防护等级机箱规格。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定（強制，2025年8月1日起生效）。GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查由地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被幾內亞捐助方資助項目規格認可為等同於IEC 62619或IEC 62933-5-2。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據須在幾內亞項目審查中補充符合IEC要求的文件。此外，中國國內測試條件不涵蓋幾內亞的熱帶濕度、塵埃和高溫環境——須另行驗證熱降額和IP防護等級機箱規格。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)

gap.en: Gap: Guinea has no confirmed mandatory national BESS fire safety installation code as of the dataset date. In practice, fire safety requirements are driven by donor specifications and project-owner obligations. Key actions for exporters and project teams: (a) confirm directly with IGNM whether any mandatory fire safety conformity obligation applies to BESS equipment imported into Guinea, and whether any technical regulation has been adopted post-dataset date; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates for cells and modules, and IEC 62933-5-2 system-level safety documentation, as these are the expected baseline for donor-financed projects; (c) prepare thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation design, suppression system design, and emergency shutdown procedure documentation in accordance with IEC 62933-5-2 and project-owner specifications; (d) address Guinea-specific environmental conditions in system design: IP54 or higher enclosure rating for dust and humidity protection is recommended for outdoor BESS installations in Guinea's tropical coastal climate; thermal derating calculations for ambient temperatures exceeding 35°C must be provided; (e) for mining-context BESS (bauxite operations), confirm any additional fire safety or hazardous area classification obligations under the mining concession agreement.
gap.zh: 差距：截至本数据集日期，几内亚无经确认的强制性国家BESS消防安全安装规范。实践中，消防安全要求由捐助方规格和项目业主义务驱动。出口商和项目团队的关键行动：（a）直接向IGNM确认对几内亚进口BESS设备是否适用任何强制消防安全合格评定义务，以及数据集日期后是否已采纳任何技术法规；（b）取得电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书，以及IEC 62933-5-2系统级安全文件，这是捐助方资助项目的预期基准；（c）依据IEC 62933-5-2和项目业主规格，准备热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风设计、抑制系统设计及紧急停机程序文件；（d）在系统设计中应对几内亚特定环境条件：建议几内亚热带沿海气候户外BESS装置采用IP54或更高防护等级机箱以防尘防湿；须提供环境温度超过35°C的热降额计算；（e）对于矿业背景BESS（铝土矿作业），确认采矿特许权协议下任何额外的消防安全或危险区域分类义务。
gap.zht: 差距：截至本數據集日期，幾內亞無經確認的強制性國家BESS消防安全安裝規範。實踐中，消防安全要求由捐助方規格和項目業主義務驅動。出口商和項目團隊的關鍵行動：（a）直接向IGNM確認對幾內亞進口BESS設備是否適用任何強制消防安全合格評定義務，以及數據集日期後是否已採納任何技術法規；（b）取得電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書，以及IEC 62933-5-2系統級安全文件，這是捐助方資助項目的預期基準；（c）依據IEC 62933-5-2和項目業主規格，準備熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風設計、抑制系統設計及緊急停機程序文件；（d）在系統設計中應對幾內亞特定環境條件：建議幾內亞熱帶沿海氣候戶外BESS裝置採用IP54或更高防護等級機箱以防塵防濕；須提供環境溫度超過35°C的熱降額計算；（e）對於礦業背景BESS（鋁土礦作業），確認採礦特許權協議下任何額外的消防安全或危險區域分類義務。

mandatory_status.target: Not confirmed — Guinea has no publicly confirmed mandatory national BESS fire safety installation code as of dataset date; requirements are project-specific and driven by donor agency standards and project-owner specifications; verify directly with IGNM
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements; GB 44240-2024 mandatory for cells/modules over 100 kWh from August 2025

source.publisher: IGNM (Institut Guinéen de Normalisation et de Métrologie) — Guinea national standards body (URL unverified; engage IGNM directly for mandatory conformity scope)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Guinea has no confirmed mandatory national BESS fire safety installation code as of the dataset date. Fire safety requirements for Guinea BESS projects are driven by donor specifications (IEC 62619, IEC 62933-5-2) and project-owner obligations. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation alone is not sufficient for Guinea donor-financed project acceptance. Obtain IEC 62619 and IEC 62933-5-2 evidence and prepare project-specific fire safety design documentation addressing Guinea's tropical humidity, elevated ambient temperature, and dust environment. Verify mandatory conformity scope with IGNM before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，几内亚无经确认的强制性国家BESS消防安全安装规范。几内亚BESS项目的消防安全要求由捐助方规格（IEC 62619、IEC 62933-5-2）和项目业主义务驱动。仅凭中国GB标准消防安全文件不足以满足几内亚捐助方资助项目的验收要求。须取得IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2证据，并准备应对几内亚热带湿度、较高环境温度和尘埃环境的项目专属消防安全设计文件。出货前须向IGNM核实强制合格评定范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，幾內亞無經確認的強制性國家BESS消防安全安裝規範。幾內亞BESS項目的消防安全要求由捐助方規格（IEC 62619、IEC 62933-5-2）和項目業主義務驅動。僅憑中國GB標準消防安全文件不足以滿足幾內亞捐助方資助項目的驗收要求。須取得IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2證據，並準備應對幾內亞熱帶濕度、較高環境溫度和塵埃環境的項目專屬消防安全設計文件。出貨前須向IGNM核實強制合格評定範圍。
